title: astragalus helleri
intro: Astragalus helleri, also known as Heller's milkvetch, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the legume family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its adaptogenic properties, which help the body adapt to stress and promote overall well-being. Astragalus helleri is believed to possess medicinal properties that boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant effects, leading to various health benefits such as improved cardiovascular health, enhanced respiratory function, and increased endurance. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including capsules, teas, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
